subcodes.first_line: O thou who art learned in the school of mystic knowledge! Strive thou to become even as a child who hath mastered his lessons in the school of God—that is, from among the learned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ادیب دبستان عرفان جهدی کن که در دبستان الهی طفل سبقخوان گردی یعنی از ادیب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @education of children; moral education
